bird.name: Golden-winged manakin
bird.summary: The golden-winged manakin (Masius chrysopterus) is a species of bird in the family Pipridae. It is found in Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Ve…

locations.name: 云雾森林
locations.summary: 云雾森林（cloud forest）是一种热带或亚热带常绿山地雨林。其特点是其林冠持续性，经常性或季节性的环绕着云雾。云雾森林的地面和植被上通常覆盖着丰富的苔藓，因此其也被称之为苔藓森林（mossy forest）。雲霧森林通常形成于山脉…

relations.subject: Golden-winged manakin
relations.evidence: III | title =Birds of Peru | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =revised and updated |series=Princeton Field Guides | date =2010 | location =Princeton, NJ | pages =498 |isbn = 978-0691130231 }} The golden-winged manakin inhabits wet montane cloudforest, though it will forage in clearings and forest edges. In elevation it ranges between in Venezuela, in Colombia, mostly in Ecuador but locally lower in the west, and in Peru
